note: Same CPU kernel across the Ruby runtime ladder: the MRI interpreter, MRI + the in-box YJIT JIT (--yjit, zero deps — the Ruby analog of PyPy), and crystalruby (inline-compiled Crystal hot paths called from MRI via FFI — the Ruby analog of CPython+Cython). Crystal standalone (Ruby-syntax, LLVM-native) is in the codec matrix.

runtimes.note: in-box YJIT JIT (--yjit), zero deps — the Ruby analog of PyPy
inline-compiled Crystal hot path (Ruby analog of CPython+Cython)
